summary: Iteration 236 - Bipolar Gravity Ecosystem Testing Complete. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new Bipolar Gravity physics features working correctly. SovereignCrossbar renders at top with 5 pole modules (mixer, trade, starchart, meditation, wellness). Crossbar correctly hidden on excluded pages (/, /auth, /intro). Pole drag past 150px threshold triggers NebulaSphere detachment with Canvas 2D rotating sphere and repulsion launch. NebulaPlayground renders with GravityWellIndicator showing intensity-based pulsing. Multiple spheres can be detached simultaneously. 2-second grace period prevents premature vacuum catch. SovereignHUD visible at bottom-left showing task stats. Command Mode (Ctrl+K) working with Orchestrate button. Mixer page (/suanpan) loads with all transport buttons and sphere_merge handler.

issues: SmartDock at bottom-left may intercept clicks on SovereignHUD toggle - minor z-index overlap. HUD is still functional.
Credits running low notification and Install ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE prompt appear - expected behavior for test user.

critical_code_review_comments: SuanpanPhysics.js correctly implements inverse-square gravitational attraction (F=G*m1*m2/r²) with G_CONSTANT=800
SuanpanPhysics.js correctly implements repulsion launch (sling-shot) with REPULSION_FORCE=2.5
SuanpanPhysics.js correctly implements perimeter buffer (elastic walls) with PERIMETER_BUFFER=60px and PERIMETER_STIFFNESS=0.4
SuanpanPhysics.js correctly implements orbital decay (centering) with ORBITAL_DECAY=0.002 and REST_HEIGHT_RATIO=0.33
SuanpanPhysics.js correctly implements vacuum catch with VACUUM_CATCH_Y=65px and 2-second grace period
SuanpanPhysics.js correctly implements rotational inertia with MODULE_MASS values (mixer=3.0, starchart=2.2, trade=1.8, meditation=1.2, wellness=1.0)
SuanpanPhysics.js correctly implements proximity resonance detection with RESONANCE_PAIRS and PROXIMITY_THRESHOLD=180px
SovereignCrossbar.js correctly implements LuminousTether (SVG elastic string with quadratic curve)
SovereignCrossbar.js correctly implements TetherBreakaway (8-particle shower on detach)
SovereignCrossbar.js correctly implements PoleModule with SNAP_THRESHOLD=150px and mass-based spring physics
SovereignCrossbar.js correctly implements VacuumZone indicator
NebulaSphere.js correctly implements Canvas 2D sphere with golden ratio vertex distribution (120 points)
NebulaSphere.js correctly implements 3D to 2D perspective projection with rotation
NebulaSphere.js correctly implements physics loop (gravity, perimeter, orbital decay, friction, vacuum catch)
NebulaSphere.js correctly implements proximity resonance glow ring
NebulaSphere.js correctly implements snap lock animation with pulsing ring
NebulaPlayground.js correctly implements ResonanceTether (SVG between compatible spheres)
NebulaPlayground.js correctly implements GravityWellIndicator with GRAVITY_WELL_RADIUS=180px and intensity-based pulsing
NebulaPlayground.js correctly implements SupernovaPulse with secondary shockwave ring
NebulaPlayground.js correctly implements INJECTION_MAP for cross-domain merging (starchart, trade, meditation, wellness)
OrbitalNavigation.js correctly manages detachedModules + launchVelocities between Crossbar and Playground
OrbitalNavigation.js correctly excludes paths: /, /auth, /intro
SuanpanMixer.js correctly implements sphere_merge EventBus handler for cross-domain injection
SovereignHUD.js correctly implements Priority Queue stats visualization with 3 channels (Nexus Path, Sensory Stream, Background Orbit)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 236 verified the complete Bipolar Gravity Ecosystem physics engine. Key components: (1) SuanpanPhysics.js contains all physics calculations: inverse-square gravity (calcGravityPull), repulsion launch (calcRepulsionLaunch), perimeter buffer (calcPerimeterForce), orbital decay (calcOrbitalDecay), vacuum catch (checkVacuumCatch), rotational inertia (calcRotationalMomentum), proximity resonance (detectResonance). (2) SovereignCrossbar at top with 5 pole modules - each can be dragged down past 150px to detach into NebulaSphere with LuminousTether visible during drag and TetherBreakaway particles on snap. (3) NebulaSphere uses Canvas 2D with golden ratio vertex distribution, 3D projection math, and full physics integration. (4) NebulaPlayground orchestrates spheres with GravityWellIndicator (180px radius), ResonanceTether between compatible spheres, and SupernovaPulse on gravity well collision. (5) MODULE_MASS values affect rotational inertia: mixer=3.0 (heaviest), starchart=2.2, trade=1.8, meditation=1.2, wellness=1.0 (lightest). (6) RESONANCE_PAIRS define compatible spheres that glow together: starchart+meditation, meditation+wellness, etc. (7) 2-second grace period after launch prevents premature vacuum catch. (8) Vacuum catch requires sphere moving upward (velocity.y < -5) near top (y < 65px). Test user grad_test_522@test.com. Trial Graduation modal appears on first visit - dismiss by clicking 'Continue with free plan'.

crossbar_renders_at_top.details: SovereignCrossbar renders at top of page on authenticated pages with z-index 200

crossbar_5_pole_modules.details: 5 pole modules visible: mixer (Divine Director), trade (Trade Circle), starchart (Star Charts), meditation (Meditation), wellness (Wellness)

pole_drag_200px_detachment.details: Dragging pole module down past 150px threshold triggers detachment - pole disappears from crossbar, sphere appears

nebula_sphere_canvas_2d.details: NebulaSphere appears after pole detachment with Canvas 2D rotating sphere using golden ratio vertex distribution

sphere_2s_grace_period.details: Sphere stays visible after 2-second grace period - vacuum catch prevented during this time

multiple_spheres_detached.details: Multiple spheres (meditation, wellness) can be detached simultaneously and float independently

gravity_well_indicator.details: NebulaPlayground renders GravityWellIndicator at viewport center with intensity-based pulsing

sovereign_hud_visible.details: SovereignHUD widget visible at bottom-left showing task stats (idle/active state)

luminous_tether_during_drag.details: LuminousTether SVG visible between crossbar and module during drag (before snap threshold)

tether_breakaway_particles.details: TetherBreakaway particle shower appears on detachment (8 particles radiating outward)

backend_sovereign_status.details: GET /api/sovereign/status returns tier, capabilities, experience config

backend_mixer_subscription.details: GET /api/mixer/subscription returns tier config with layer_cap, keyframe_automation, speed_bonus

backend_mixer_sources.details: GET /api/mixer/sources returns sources list with phonic_tone frequencies

mixer_page_loads.details: Mixer page (/suanpan) loads correctly with Divine Director header and all transport buttons

mixer_sphere_merge_handler.details: SuanpanMixer.js implements sphere_merge EventBus handler for cross-domain injection (starchart, trade, meditation, wellness)

command_mode_ctrl_k.details: Command Mode (Ctrl+K) opens correctly with 'Command the Master Orchestrator...' input and Orchestrate button
